top_signals.title: Tech, Finance Titans Redraw Stablecoin Map in Threat to Circle
top_signals.summary: For years, the stablecoin race has been defined by a simple objective: build the dominant digital dollar. This week’s turbulence in Circle Internet Group Inc.’s shares suggests investors are beginning to price a different future — one in which the biggest rewards may accrue not to the companies issuing stablecoins, but to those controlling how they move.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Soybeans Drift as China Buying Awaited After US Tariff Statement
top_signals.summary: Soybean futures drifted between small gains and losses as traders weighed a statement by China’s government on rolling back tariffs on US agricultural products, a move that could pave the way for purchases by the Asian country.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: FBI director discloses Strategy holdings months after deadline: Report
top_signals.summary: Strategy is a registered US government contractor, though Kash Patel claimed that “no current conflict exists” with his $100,001 and $250,000 worth of the company’s stock that he reported late.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: FCA criticises investment firms for unintelligible disclosure documents
top_signals.summary: UK financial watchdog also bans ‘double-dipping’ as it pushes to improve treatment of customers
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Apollo struggles to sell Hispanic grocer after US immigration raids hit sales
top_signals.summary: Investors and analysts say customers’ fear of Trump’s deportation campaign weakened the private equity-owned chain
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Teenage rapists given stricter sentence after public outcry
top_signals.summary: Boys handed a four-year detention sentence after attorney-general’s referral to the Court of Appeal

top_signals.title: Vatican schism puts Maga Catholics under pressure
top_signals.summary: Pope Leo excommunicates ultra-conservative bishops whose views resonate with parts of the US right

top_signals.title: On America’s 250th, remember your Adam Smith . . .
top_signals.summary: The ground is fertile for a renewal of the commitment to free markets and free people
